scripts.build: pnpm --filter @atomeve/schemas build && pnpm --filter @atomeve/registry-generator build && pnpm --filter atomeve build && pnpm --filter @atomeve/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @atomeve/schemas typecheck && pnpm --filter @atomeve/registry-generator typecheck && pnpm --filter @atomeve/registry-generator build && pnpm --filter atomeve typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm generate && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm verify:fixtures && pnpm secret-scan
